---
title: "Fish_Length_Exploration"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

```

## Data

```{r}
#View(LoF)
```

## Species

```{r}
unique(LoF$Species)

PP <- LoF %>%
  filter(Species == "Pimephales promelas") %>%
  filter(Tox_conc != "3032") %>%
  filter(Tox_conc != "1567")

# Tox concentrations were filtered above because there were less observations at those levels

OM <- LoF %>%
  filter(Species == "Oncorhynchus mykiss")
```

## Graph


```{r}

boxplot(Length ~ Tox_conc, data=PP[PP$Toxicant == "Sulfate",])

boxplot(Length ~ Tox_conc, data=OM[OM$Toxicant == "Sulfate",])
boxplot(Length ~ Tox_conc, data=OM[OM$Toxicant == "Nitrate",])

```
